div.head: 532. Editorial Note
div.p: The results of the elections held in Thailand on December 15 were not decisive. The final election returns were tabulated on December 27 and the vote was broadly distributed among a wide range of political parties. The moderate Unionist Party won 45 seats in Parliament and joined with the Army-supported National Socialist Party to form a government under former Defense Minister Thanom Kitti-kachorn.
